description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic dated as [Dhu] al-Qa'da 1013 AH which is 1605 CE: "אל קעדה ס[נת] יג ואלפ", further down the recto the year [5]364 AM is also mentioned (1603/1604 CE). The accounting format is complex and bears multiple layers of figures being crossed out and adjusted. The commodity "חריר / silk" is repeated on many occasions on the recto. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
